name: hero-section
purpose: nimiq.com home hero: deep purple radial-gradient sky with floating translucent hexagons, white 800-weight 'Universal Money for Independent Individuals' headline, lavender subtitle, light-blue 'Create Wallet ↗' pill, WORKS WITH partner row, and a dotted-globe white arc cresting at the bottom.

props.name: subtitle
props.default: In a centralized world, Nimiq gives independence back to you.

notes: MARKETING component, screenshot-referenced (no upstream source). Calibrated against references/screenshots/nimiq-com/home-hero-section.png, home-hero-cta-button.png and home-desktop-full.png per references/supporting-elements-brief-2026-06-11.md item 7. Dotted globe is generated (SVG dot pattern over rough continent blobs clipped to a huge white circle) — dot/continent positions are illustrative, not geographic. Partner logos (CryptoPayment Link, ₿ coin, NAKA, ring mark) are simplified placeholder marks. Modern px-based styling with Mulish; no legacy framework dependency. SVG ids prefixed nq-hs- to stay collision-safe when embedded with other snippets.
